# Discrete Fracture Network Modeling

**Summary**: A 3D model of the fracture network in a reservoir.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2012-abdelgader|Abdelgader, 2012]] constructed DFN models using stochastic and deterministic methods to characterize connectivity.
